content: Caller: 'Hamaare ghar mein 3 feet paani aa gaya hai, bachche chhatt par hain, please jaldi aao!' Address: House B-47, Korangi No. 4.
Mass heat stroke emergency — multiple collapses at Pakistan Chowk and Qasba Colony. Edhi dispatching 3 ambulances. 20+ potential victims. JPMC and Civil Hospital informed.
Caller reports tanker overturned on M-9. Fuel spill. At least 12 injured, 2 critical. Fire risk present. Emergency services need to be rerouted — M-9 completely sealed.
